narrative: Title shows open building permit from 2019 + unrecorded transfer 2022. Mechanic's lien for $85K unresolved. Phase I ESA identified REC (former dry cleaner solvents), vapor intrusion concern. Asbestos present in ceiling tiles. Structural inspection: foundation settlement + active roof leaks. Unpermitted alteration converting Class B to event space. Certificate of Occupancy expired 2021, not issued for current use. Pending litigation with neighbor over boundary. Flood zone AE — no flood insurance evidence. ADA noncompliance noted by 12 barriers.
